name: Deviled Shrimp
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 pounds Cooked shrimp, peeled and deveined
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 400°F.
2. In a saucepan, sauté onions, green peppers, and celery in butter until the vegetables are soft but not browned. Stir in flour, mustard, salt, and milk; cook over medium heat, stirring constantly, until the sauce thickens.
3. Add Worcestershire sauce, pimentos, shrimp, and olives to the saucepan; simmer until heated thoroughly.
4. Spoon the shrimp mixture into 4 ramekins; top with bread crumbs. Bake for 15 minutes, or until browned and bubbly. Remove from oven and serve hot.
